items.title: Eli Lilly doubles down on in vivo with $7bn Kelonia buyout
items.summary: Lilly now has a lentiviral and LNP-based platform for in vivo delivery under its belt, which could broaden the company's chance of success.

items.title: Pfizer and Astellas secure FDA priority review for Padcev MIBC combo therapy
items.summary: Pfizer and Astellas have received FDA acceptance for priority review of their sBLA for perioperative Padcev combined with Keytruda for MIBC.

items.title: Asahi Kasei acquires German company Aicuris
items.summary: Asahi Kasei has completed its acquisition of Aicuris Anti-infective Cures, a German biopharmaceutical company.

items.title: British patients risking “fake” weight loss drugs, despite safety concerns, survey says
items.summary: Some British people are turning to unregulated weight loss medications sold online as drug prices climb and prescription waits lengthen.

items.title: Boehringer Ingelheim launches AI centre in London
items.summary: The new site will focus on the use of AI models for purposes including the discovery and development of targeted medicines for patients with unmet medical needs.
